meta.description: Wild Rift Baron Lane champion data based on wildriftcounter.com matchups, tier lists, and community discussions

champions.name: Ornn

goodAgainst.name: Darius
goodAgainst.note: Tanks his damage, E stops his Q heal

goodAgainst.name: Renekton
goodAgainst.note: Tanks his burst, W negates empowered W

goodAgainst.name: Sett
goodAgainst.note: Tanks his damage, Q %hp chunks him

pickWhen: Need a safe blind pick - Ornn is one of the safest first picks
Team needs a front line tank (only tank on team)
Enemy has multiple AD threats (Darius + Graves jungle)
Example: Enemy top is Darius or Sett, Ornn is a strong counter
avoidWhen: Enemy has strong duelists (Fiora, Camille, Jax)
Enemy has heavy poke/ranged top (Jayce, Teemo, Vayne)
Team needs split push pressure (your team has no split pusher)
Example: Enemy picks Fiora or Camille - avoid Ornn
champions.tips: Use passive (P) to upgrade team items. Brittle (W + auto) + CC (E/R) is your engage. Build Sunfire into Iceborn Gauntlet.

champions.name: Malphite

goodAgainst.name: Darius
goodAgainst.note: Tanks his damage, E reduces his AS

goodAgainst.name: Sett
goodAgainst.note: Tanks his damage, E reduces his AS

goodAgainst.name: Yasuo
goodAgainst.note: AS slow (E) and armor (W) counters him

badAgainst.name: Mordekaiser
badAgainst.note: AP damage ignores his armor (passive + Q)

badAgainst.name: Sylas
badAgainst.note: Steals and uses his ult better (R)

avoidSynergies: Team has no follow up engage
pickWhen: Enemy team is full AD (Darius top + Graves jungle + Zed mid)
Team needs engage (your team has no engage)
Need to counter heavy AD top (pick into Darius, Sett, or Tryndamere)
Example: Enemy top is Darius and jungle is Vi - Malphite is perfect
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy AP damage (Mordekaiser, Gwen, Sylas)
Enemy has mobile champions that can kite (Vayne, Ezreal)
Example: Enemy top is Mordekaiser - avoid Malphite
champions.tips: Ult (R) into grouped enemies. Build armor to scale damage (W passive). Combo: R > E > Q > W.

champions.name: Sion

goodAgainst.name: Sett
goodAgainst.note: Out-sustains his burst with W shield

pickWhen: Need scaling tank (your team needs late game frontline)
Team needs split push pressure (Sion can split with R)
Enemy has low mobility (Darius, Sett, Garen)
Example: Enemy top is Darius - Sion can survive and out-scale
avoidWhen: Enemy has high mobility (Camille, Fiora, Irelia)
Enemy has true damage champions (Vayne, Fiora, Camille)
Example: Enemy picks Fiora or Camille - avoid Sion
champions.tips: Passive (P) health stacking from minion kills. Use Q to zone and poke. R for engage or escape.

champions.name: Dr. Mundo

goodAgainst.name: Sett
goodAgainst.note: Tanks his burst with R regen

pickWhen: Team needs sustain (your team has no frontline sustain)
Enemy lacks true damage (no Vayne, Fiora, Camille)
Example: Enemy top is Sett or Garen - Mundo is great
avoidWhen: Enemy has true damage (Vayne, Fiora, Camille, Gwen)
Enemy has heavy poke (Jayce, Teemo)
Example: Enemy picks Vayne top - avoid Mundo
champions.tips: Use W for tenacity. R for massive regen. Q for poke and slow.

champions.name: Nautilus

goodAgainst.name: Darius
goodAgainst.note: CC chain (passive + Q + R) stops him

pickWhen: Team needs hook engage (your team has no engage)
Need CC setup (your team has burst damage)
Example: Enemy top is Darius - Nautilus can lock him down
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile pokers (Ezreal, Vayne, Jayce)
Enemy can kite easily (Teemo, Vayne)
Example: Enemy top is Jayce or Teemo - avoid Nautilus
champions.tips: Hook (Q) > auto (passive root) > E slow > R is your combo. Use passive root on every auto.

champions.name: Poppy
pickWhen: Enemy has mobile champions with multiple dashes (Camille, Irelia, Riven, Renekton)
Need anti-dive champion (to protect carries)
Example: Enemy picks Camille or Irelia - Poppy is a hard counter
avoidWhen: Enemy has pure tanks (Ornn, Malphite)
Enemy has heavy poke (Jayce, Teemo, Vayne)
Example: Enemy picks Ornn or Malphite - avoid Poppy
champions.tips: Use W to block dashes. R can save teammates or knock enemies away. E into wall for stun.

champions.name: Darius

goodAgainst.name: Garen
goodAgainst.note: Out-trades and out-sustains with Q heal

badAgainst.name: Camille
badAgainst.note: Dodges his Q with E and out-duels

pickWhen: Enemy has melee low mobility (Garen, Sett, Ornn)
Need lane dominance (win early game)
Can snowball early (your team needs early pressure)
Example: Enemy picks Garen or Sett - Darius wins lane
avoidWhen: Enemy has ranged top (Teemo, Jayce, Vayne, Gnar)
Enemy has high mobility (Camille, Fiora)
Enemy has hard CC (can't stack passive)
Example: Enemy picks Teemo or Vayne - avoid Darius
champions.tips: Stack 5 bleed (passive) for ultimate (R) damage. Play aggressive early. Q heals for each enemy hit.

champions.name: Sett

goodAgainst.name: Darius
goodAgainst.note: W wins short trades with true damage

pickWhen: Enemy has melee low mobility (Darius, Garen, Renekton)
Need engage (your team has no engage)
Example: Enemy picks Darius or Garen - Sett wins lane
avoidWhen: Enemy has tanks (Malphite, Ornn)
Enemy has ranged/CC (Teemo, Vayne, Jayce)
Example: Enemy picks Malphite - avoid Sett
champions.tips: Build grit (passive) then W for max true damage. Ult (R) carries into your team. E stuns if enemies are on both sides.

champions.name: Aatrox

goodAgainst.name: Ornn
goodAgainst.note: Out-sustains his damage with E + passive

badAgainst.name: Irelia
badAgainst.note: Dodges his Q with Q dashes

pickWhen: Enemy has low mobility tanks (Ornn, Malphite, Sion)
Need sustain in teamfights (your team needs healing)
Example: Enemy picks Ornn or Malphite - Aatrox wins
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile duelist (Fiora, Camille, Irelia)
Enemy has hard CC (can't heal)
Example: Enemy picks Fiora or Camille - avoid Aatrox
champions.tips: Hit sweet spots of Q (knockup). Use E to reposition Q. R for massive healing and damage.

champions.name: Mordekaiser
pickWhen: Enemy has squishy carry to isolate (ADC or mid)
Need to win side lane (split push)
Example: Enemy has squishy ADC - pick Mordekaiser to ult them
avoidWhen: Enemy has early snowball (can't scale)
Enemy can kite easily (Vayne, Camille)
Example: Enemy picks Vayne or Fiora - avoid Mordekaiser
champions.tips: Ult (R) carries in teamfights. Passive (P) does AOE damage. E pull into Q + auto for damage.

champions.name: Camille
pickWhen: Enemy has tanks (Ornn, Malphite, Sion) - she shreds them
Need a skill-based duelist (your team needs split push)
Example: Enemy picks Ornn - Camille is a counter
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard CC (can't dive)
Enemy has ranged poke (Teemo, Jayce, Vayne)
Example: Enemy picks Teemo or Poppy - avoid Camille
champions.tips: Second Q (Q2) does true damage. Ult (R) to lock down carries. E for mobility and stun.

champions.name: Fiora
pickWhen: Need a split pusher (your team wants to split push)
Enemy has tanks to shred (Ornn, Malphite, Sion)
Example: Enemy picks Ornn or Sion - Fiora is a counter
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard CC (can't proc vitals)
Team needs teamfighter (your team needs 5v5)
Example: Enemy picks Pantheon or Teemo - avoid Fiora
champions.tips: Proc vitals (passive) for true damage and healing. Parry (W) key CC or damage. Q for mobility and damage.

champions.name: Jax
pickWhen: Game will go late (your team has scaling)
Need split push pressure (your team needs side lane pressure)
Example: Enemy has tanks - Jax out-scales them
avoidWhen: Enemy has early snowball (Renekton, Darius)
Enemy has heavy CC (can't split)
Example: Enemy picks Renekton or Teemo - avoid Jax
champions.tips: Use E to dodge autos and stun. Late game scaling monster. Q for mobility.

champions.name: Renekton
pickWhen: Need early pressure (your team needs early game)
Enemy is weak early (Jax, Fiora, Camille)
Example: Enemy picks Jax or Fiora - Renekton wins early
avoidWhen: Enemy has scaling tanks (Ornn, Malphite)
Team needs late game (your team scales)
Example: Enemy picks Ornn - avoid Renekton
champions.tips: Build fury (passive) for empowered abilities (Q/W/E). Play aggressive early. E in > W > Q > E out.

champions.name: Riven
pickWhen: Need skill-based carry (you can animation cancel)
Enemy is squishy (no tanks)
Example: Enemy picks Jax or Garen - Riven wins
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard counters (Fiora, Renekton, Poppy)
Team needs frontline (your team has no tank)
Example: Enemy picks Fiora or Renekton - avoid Riven
champions.tips: Learn animation cancels (Q > auto > Q > auto). Ult (R) for execute damage. E for mobility/shield.

champions.name: Irelia
pickWhen: Enemy has melee champions (Sett, Garen, Mordekaiser)
Need mobility (your team needs engage)
Example: Enemy picks Sett or Garen - Irelia wins
avoidWhen: Enemy has lockdown CC (Pantheon, Lissandra)
Enemy has hard counters (Darius, Fiora, Camille)
Example: Enemy picks Darius or Fiora - avoid Irelia
champions.tips: Stack passive (P) for DPS. Use Q to reset on minions. E for stun. R for slow and mark.

champions.name: Gwen
pickWhen: Enemy has tanks (Ornn, Malphite, Sion) - she shreds them
Team needs AP damage (your team is AD heavy)
Example: Enemy picks Ornn or Malphite - Gwen is a counter
avoidWhen: Enemy has AD snowball (Darius, Renekton)
Enemy has hard CC (can't W)
Example: Enemy picks Darius or Renekton - avoid Gwen
champions.tips: W gives invulnerability outside mist. Q does %HP true damage in center. E for dash and attack speed.

champions.name: Jayce

badAgainst.name: Malphite
badAgainst.note: Tanks his poke with W passive

pickWhen: Need poke (your team needs siege damage)
Enemy is melee low mobility (Darius, Garen, Sett)
Example: Enemy picks Darius - Jayce can bully him
avoidWhen: Enemy has tanks (Malphite, Ornn)
Enemy has hard CC (can't kite)
Example: Enemy picks Malphite - avoid Jayce
champions.tips: Use ranged form for poke (Q+E), melee form for burst (Q+W). Combo forms (R).

champions.name: Gnar
pickWhen: Need teamfight setup (your team needs engage)
Need safe lane (survive laning phase)
Example: Enemy picks Darius - Gnar can kite him
avoidWhen: Enemy has burst before mega (can't transform)
Enemy can all-in early (Camille, Fiora)
Example: Enemy picks Camille or Fiora - avoid Gnar
champions.tips: Manage rage bar (passive) for mega form. Ult (R) into walls for stun. Q for poke and slow.

champions.name: Teemo

badAgainst.name: Darius
badAgainst.note: If he gets close, you die (E pull)

pickWhen: Enemy is melee (Darius, Garen, Sett, Jax)
Need vision control (shrooms for objectives)
Example: Enemy picks Darius or Garen - Teemo is a counter
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile divers (Camille, Irelia, Pantheon)
Enemy has high burst (can oneshot you)
Example: Enemy picks Pantheon or Irelia - avoid Teemo
champions.tips: Place shrooms (R) for vision and defense. Blind (Q) key auto attackers. Passive (P) invisibility for surprise.

champions.name: Kennen
pickWhen: Need teamfight ult (your team needs AOE stun)
Enemy clumps up (teamfight comp)
Example: Enemy has immobile carries - Kennen R wins fights
avoidWhen: Enemy can disengage easily (Janna, Gragas)
Example: Enemy has Janna or Gragas - avoid Kennen
champions.tips: Flash + Ult (R) to stun entire team. Stack passive (P) for stuns. Q for poke. E for mobility.

champions.name: Akali
pickWhen: Enemy is squishy (no tanks)
Need mobile assassin (your team needs dive)
Example: Enemy has squishy ADC - Akali can dive them
avoidWhen: Enemy has tanks (Ornn, Malphite)
Enemy has hard CC (Pantheon, Galio)
Example: Enemy picks Ornn or Malphite- avoid Akali
champions.tips: Use shroud (W) to outplay. Passive (P) auto for extra damage. Q for poke. E for reposition.

champions.name: Yasuo
pickWhen: Team has knockups (Malphite, Gragas, Nautilus)
Need scaling carry (your team needs damage)
Example: Team has Malphite - Yasuo can combo with R
avoidWhen: Enemy has tanks (Malphite, Ornn)
No knockup synergy (your team lacks knockups)
Example: Enemy picks Malphite - avoid Yasuo
champions.tips: Stack Q for tornado. Ults (R) require knockup setup. Windwall (W) blocks projectiles. E for mobility.

champions.name: Yone
pickWhen: Team has knockups (Malphite, Gragas, Nautilus)
Need scaling carry (your team needs damage)
Example: Team has Malphite - Yone can combo with R
avoidWhen: Enemy has tanks (Malphite, Ornn)
No knockup synergy (your team lacks knockups)
Example: Enemy picks Malphite - avoid Yone
champions.tips: Second Q for knockup. E for engage/disengage. R for multi-target knockup.

champions.name: Pantheon
pickWhen: Need early game pressure (your team needs early lead)
Need to roam (your team needs map pressure)
Example: Enemy picks Akali or Irelia - Pantheon counters
avoidWhen: Game will go late (enemy scales)
Enemy has tanks (Malphite, Ornn)
Example: Enemy picks Malphite - avoid Pantheon
champions.tips: Use R to roam. Empowered W gives stun. E for damage block. Q for poke and execute.

champions.name: Wukong
pickWhen: Need engage (your team has no engage)
Need flex pick (can go jungle or baron)
Example: Enemy picks Darius - Wukong clone dodges his Q
avoidWhen: Enemy has specific counters (Teemo, Camille, Fiora)
Example: Enemy picks Teemo or Camille - avoid Wukong
champions.tips: Use clone (W) to bait abilities. Ult (R) to knock up. Q for armor shred. E for gap close.

draftRules.text: Tanks like Ornn and Malphite are strong into AD bruisers. Build armor and survive the lane. Pick Ornn or Malphite.
Duelists like Fiora and Camille shred tanks with true damage. Win through split push. Pick Fiora or Camille.
Ranged champions (Teemo, Jayce, Gnar) can kite melee bruisers. Play safe and poke. Pick Teemo, Jayce, or Gnar.
If your team has multiple AD threats, Malphite is a strong pick against full AD comps. Pick Malphite.
Split pushers require team coordination. Match their split with grouped plays or counter-split. Pick a champion that can match their split (Fiora, Jax, Tryndamere).
Poppy's W blocks dashes. Consider Poppy against mobile champions. Pick Poppy.
AP top laners need MR counter building. Consider picking an AD duelist (Fiora, Camille) or buying Hexdrinker.
